features.name: Phase 1: .NET 8 API Setup + Auth + Facility
features.details: Solution, project, NuGet packages, Program.cs, JWT auth, Serilog, Swagger, CORS, ExceptionHandlingMiddleware, ApiResponse, BaseRepository, UserRepository, FacilityRepository, AuthService, JwtTokenService, NovaradPasswordHasher, AuthController, FacilitiesController, FluentValidation

features.name: Phase 1: Next.js Frontend Shell
features.details: Next.js 16 created, shadcn/ui installed (20 components including table), globals.css with OKLCh theme, types.ts, api.ts client, auth-context.tsx, nav-sidebar.tsx, login page, (app) layout with auth guard, dashboard, all route pages. Build verified.

features.name: Phase 2: Modality CRUD + Mapping File + AE Monitor APIs
features.details: ModalityRepository (CRUD with safe delete), ModalityTypeRepository (CRUD with existence check), AeMonitorRepository (shared_local.events query), MappingFileService (read/write/backup/restore/validate), ModalitiesController, ModalityTypesController, MappingController, AeMonitorController, FluentValidation validators, all registered in DI. Build verified.

features.name: Phase 2: Modality List + Mapping Editor + AE Monitor UI
features.details: Modalities page (TanStack Table with sorting/filtering, create/edit/delete dialogs), Mapping Editor (Monaco raw editor + visual table with CRUD dialogs + How Mapping Works guide, backup restore), AE Monitor (auto-refresh 30s, time range selector, stats cards, filter). Build verified.

features.name: Phase 3: Study Data Access + API
features.details: StudySearchResult + StudyDetail + Series + Dataset domain models, StudySearchRequest DTO, StudyRepository (paginated search with dynamic WHERE, patient/facility/physician JOINs, series/dataset queries), StudiesController (search, getById, getSeries), SeriesController (getDatasets), registered in DI. Build verified.

features.name: Phase 3: Study Search + Detail UI
features.details: Study search page with 8-field advanced filter form, server-side paginated TanStack Table, study detail page with patient/study/clinical info cards, series table with expandable datasets. Build verified.

features.name: Phase 4: Dashboard with Stats + Charts
features.details: DashboardStats model, DashboardRepository with concurrent aggregate queries, DashboardController. Frontend: stat cards, Recharts charts, recent studies table. Build verified.

features.name: Phase 4: Settings Management
features.details: SettingsRepository with CRUD for shared.settings and site.settings. SettingsController. Frontend: tabbed UI with searchable inline-edit tables. Build verified.

features.name: Phase 4: Bulk Operations
features.details: Study update/bulk status/CSV export APIs. Frontend: checkbox selection, bulk action bar, export CSV, study detail edit mode. Build verified.

features.name: Phase 5: HL7 Configuration UI
features.details: Removed from frontend: nav sidebar, 4 page files, types, API client. Backend controllers kept for potential future use.

features.name: Phase 6: PACS Routing & Destinations
features.details: PacsDestination, RoutingZone, RouteHistoryEntry. Full CRUD + route history. 2 frontend pages. Build verified.

features.name: Remote Connection & Mapping File Configuration
features.details: ConnectionSettings model, ConnectionJsonConfigurationSource, ConnectionSettingsService, ConnectionController. Frontend: /setup page + /configuration page (separated from settings), file browser dialog, auth-context connectionReady check. All repos switched to IOptionsMonitor. Port 5001. Report Template directory settings added to connection.json overlay.

features.name: AD/LDAP Authentication Support
features.details: Implemented LDAP bind authentication. User model has UseAdAuthentication + IsLdapUser boolean flags. AuthService checks these flags and routes to LdapAuthenticationService or local password verification.

features.name: Phase 7: CPT & ICD Code Management
features.details: BillingServiceCode + IcdCode domain models. BillingCodeRepository, IcdCodeRepository. CptCodesController (9 endpoints), IcdCodesController (8 endpoints). Frontend: CPT page with table, CRUD, CSV import/export. ICD page with table, CRUD, version/category filters, obsolete/restore. Build verified.

features.name: Report Template Editor with Live Preview + Visual Builder
features.details: Backend DONE: ReportTemplateService, ReportTemplateRepository, ReportTemplatesController. Frontend Code view WORKS: Monaco editor with live preview, placeholder panel, backup/restore. Visual view (GrapesJS) PARTIALLY FIXED: content preservation on tab switch works (extractBody/wrapBody + init guard), CSS now loads via public/css/grapes.min.css, refresh crash fixed. BUT canvas still blank — 'about:srcdoc' iframe sandbox error blocking script execution in GrapesJS canvas iframe.
blockers: GrapesJS canvas iframe sandbox error: 'Blocked script execution in about:srcdoc' — scripts not allowed in sandboxed frame

features.name: Unified Novarad Settings Page
features.details: COMPLETE: Backend 12 endpoints for 7 settings tables. Frontend two-column layout with source-based categories (Shared, Site, PACS, PACS Options, RIS, RIS Options, Object Store), sidebar, search, inline edit, skeletons. NRS Admin config separated to /configuration route. Nav has Novarad section ('Novarad Settings') and System section ('Configuration'). Novarad settings confirmed loading from DB.

features.name: Unified PACS/RIS Study Editor
features.details: COMPLETE: Panel View (default) with animated pill nav + Tab View toggle. PACS↔RIS field sync with staged commit/discard. Patient demographics comparison, RIS patient details editing, order/procedure editing, report editing/creation, series modality/description editing. Link/unlink studies to RIS orders. Patient merge via ris.patients_merge(). 13 new components, 10+ new API endpoints. Test data created for 4 scenarios (Dawn Kelly, Cecil Meeks, Nicholas Overton, Cheryl Meeks).

features.name: PACS Route Queue Management
features.details: COMPLETE: Backend RouteQueueModels (4 domain classes), RouteQueueRequests (4 DTOs), 12 new methods on PacsRoutingRepository (queue/errors/history CRUD, retry, summary, queue study/series via stored functions), RouteQueueController (10 endpoints). Frontend: route-queue page with panel layout (Summary/Pending/Errors/History), filter bars, pagination, retry/clear/delete actions, confirmation dialogs. Nav sidebar updated. Both projects build verified.

features.name: External Tools Launchpad
features.details: COMPLETE (commit c123770): Per-user JSON-backed launchpad for four tool types — web URLs (open in browser), desktop apps (.exe), CLI commands/scripts, and file/folder shortcuts. Launches happen via Process.Start on the API host. Per-tool shell choice (cmd / Windows PowerShell / pwsh) with CMD /c start for reliable new-console spawning. Run-as-Administrator toggle (UAC prompt) for Executable/Command/FileOrFolder. Curated Lucide icon picker, categorized launchpad grid, FileBrowserDialog reused for host-side path picking, one-time host-launch warning banner. Backend: Configuration/ExternalToolsSettings, Services/ExternalToolsService, Controllers/V1/ExternalToolsController, Models/Domain/ExternalTool.

features.name: Services Monitor with Start/Stop/Restart
features.details: COMPLETE (commit c123770): Dashboard Services card backed by System.ServiceProcess.ServiceController. GET /api/v1/services-monitor returns snapshot filtered by configurable glob patterns (default Novarad*, Nova*, NRS*) and exact names. POST {name}/{start|stop|restart} controls services with 30s timeout + whitelist guard (only monitored services can be controlled). Bulk Restart All button with live progress toast. Collapsed by default. NovaradServer.Host config in connection.json feeds ServicesMonitor:Host — same setting drives local vs remote, can differ from database host.

features.name: Nav Sidebar Tree Structure
features.details: COMPLETE (commit c123770): Replaced hand-coded sections with recursive NavTree supporting arbitrary depth. Top-level: Dashboard, PACS, RIS, External Tools, System. RIS contains nested Modalities / Reports / Billing sub-branches. Novarad Settings under both PACS and RIS. System is strictly NRS Admin config. First-visit all collapsed; explicit user toggles win over auto-expand-on-active-route. State persists per branch in localStorage.

features.name: 1:1 Procedure Tab (formerly Orders tab)
features.details: COMPLETE (commit e9d5756): Renamed Orders tab → Procedure to match Novarad's actual 1:1 Study↔Order↔Procedure model. Merge UI removed (never valid). Flat single procedure card with three sections — Scheduling & Assignment, Clinical Details, Custom Fields. All previously read-only fields editable: Assigned Physician (new picker), Patient Class/Location/Visit #, Check-In/Start/End datetimes, STAT flag. Procedure Field Mapping panel grouped into Linking Fields (Accession, StudyUID, StudyDate, Modality) and Descriptive (Description, Facility) per Novarad knowledgebase hl7-order-to-study workflow step 11. Accession added as a new linker (was missing). Facility uses dedicated FacilityMappingRow component matching sync-field-row look with dual dropdowns (PACS facility_id / RIS site_code). Workflow steps timeline filters out is_disabled=true template rows (Vetted/Arrived/Scan Verified). Step status values corrected to real DB values — COMPLETE/CANCELLED/READY/null. Save fans out updateRisOrder + updateRisProcedure in parallel.

features.name: TipTap Rich Text Editor
features.details: COMPLETE (commit e9d5756): @tiptap/react + starter-kit + underline + link + placeholder. Toolbar: Bold/Italic/Underline/Strike, H1-H3, Bullet/Ordered/Blockquote, Link/Unlink/Clear, Undo/Redo. prose-styled content area, dark-mode aware. Used in Reports tab (create + edit). Auto-promotes legacy plain-text report bodies to paragraph HTML with entity escaping. Standard report templates converted on insert. Shared component at components/ui/rich-text-editor.tsx.

features.name: Physicians + Sites Lookup APIs
features.details: COMPLETE (commit e9d5756): GET /api/v1/physicians?q= joins ris.physicians → ris.people for display names; GET {id} for single lookup; used by PhysicianPicker autocomplete (debounced 250ms, hydrates current selection by id, Clear option, shows specialty + NPI). GET /api/v1/sites lists shared.sites for RIS site_code selection. Both wired into the procedure edit form.

features.name: RIS Test Data Reseed (1:1 + real workflow statuses)
features.details: Wiped and reseeded ris.reports, ris.order_procedure_steps, ris.order_procedures, ris.orders, ris.patients, ris.people (non-physician). Preserved physicians (person_ids 1-4) and ris.standard_steps. 10 new patients/orders/procedures linked to existing pacs.studies accessions (CR/CT/DX/US modalities only). One of each workflow state: Unscheduled, Scheduled, Patient Screened (STAT flag), Patient Checked-In, Scan Started, Scan Completed, Report Dictated, Report Signed, Complete, Cancelled. Steps populated via Novarad's own ris.order_procedure_steps_insert() function then updated per state with real DB status values (COMPLETE/CANCELLED/READY/null). Reports seeded for procedures 7, 8, 9 (Dictated/Signed/Finalized) with realistic HTML bodies. Sequences resynced after wipe to avoid PK collisions on subsequent inserts.

features.name: Standard Procedures page with CSV/Excel import
features.details: COMPLETE: New page under RIS → Modalities → Standard Procedures. Backend: StandardProcedureRepository (CRUD with FK-guard across 5 inbound tables, natural-key upsert on modality+name), StandardProceduresController (search/CRUD/import-preview/import-execute/template/export), StandardProcedureTemplateService with ClosedXML (xlsx with data-validation dropdowns for Modality + AnatomicalArea, separate Instructions/Modalities/AnatomicalAreas sheets; CSV with #-comment inline instructions). Shared CsvHelpers service extracted from CPT controller. Frontend: TanStack table with modality + area filters, CRUD dialogs, split-button dropdowns for Template/Import/Export (CSV or Excel each), import preview with overwrite-duplicates toggle. Fixed bug: ris.anatomical_areas column is 'description' not 'anatomical_area_name'.

features.name: 'Use Standard Procedure' picker on Procedure tab
features.details: COMPLETE: Searchable popover combobox (components/studies/standard-procedure-picker.tsx) wired into the Procedure tab's Study Description input AND the PACS↔RIS Description sync row. Filters by current procedure's modality by default with a 'Match modality' toggle; narrows as you type with 200ms debounce. Compact icon-only variant fits the dense sync-row controls. SyncFieldRow gained an optional extraAction slot for per-field side actions. Picking from the Description sync row sets both PACS + RIS values to the catalog name.

features.name: Refinalize button on Reports tab
features.details: COMPLETE: POST /api/v1/studies/{id}/ris-report/{reportId}/refinalize. RisRepository.RefinalizeReportAsync replicates Novarad ReportFinalizer's PACS-visibility steps: INSERT into pacs.preliminary_report_map (newest wins per vw_patient_studies_facilities), pacs.studies_update_report_availability(true), pacs.studies_update_procedure_status(7 Report_Finalized). Skips PDF/HL7/fax/email distribution — visibility refresh only. Guards: Signed/Finalized status + linked PACS study via accession. physician_id resolves via ris.physicians.user_id with fallback to logged-in user. Frontend: ghost 'Refinalize' button with RefreshCw icon appears next to Edit on eligible reports.

features.name: HIPAA lock on Final Signed reports
features.details: COMPLETE: isLegallyLocked helper (type=Final AND status=Signed). Collapsed header shows amber 'Locked' badge. Edit mode: amber banner explains the lock + addendum policy; Type + Status selects are disabled with lock icon on labels; Report Text renders as read-only prose with amber border but stays select-text for copying (instead of RichTextEditor). Notes + custom fields remain editable per compliance scope.
